title: The Human Condition III: A Soldier's Prayer
writer: Zenzô Matsuyama, Kôichi Inagaki, Masaki Kobayashi
actors: Tatsuya Nakadai, Michiyo Aratama, Tamao Nakamura
plot: His ideals challenged by life as a conscript in war-time Japan's military, a pacifist faces ever greater tests in his fight for survival.
